item.title: It's another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
beautiful
nobody gets in the way of my snacks
much, much more
purple easily. even though my ears are fucked from years of playing shows/band practices
relatable, sadly
well that’s unsettling
finally some good news
also i'm not a giant tool
the good stuff
accurate
mmm hmm
how it do that?
go ahead and disregard this meme gang
we've all been there
wobble wobble
sounds amazing
that's it for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.dc:creator: crimsonghost1

item.title: As a Field Biologist Myself, Can Agree
item.description:
Just got done in Kentucky evaluating forested habitats for endangered bats species...weather was rough from cold to really warm and lots of rain. Despite all the rain gear I brought, I was absolutely drenched head to toe after 8 hours in it. Also, with permission from the landowner, I found this skull and dragged it back to my car...I was kind of relieved that it was getting dark and can't imagine any drivers passing by on the road seeing me hauling this thing over the hill...I tried to be cryptid I guess in hopes no one asked me questions lol. It's going to a very beloved animal/nature nerd friend of mine who also loves anything horse related. Can say she's super stoked she's getting this to add to her collection of skulls! But yes, feral biologists, I am very ecstatic about my job and the random fieldwork I do!
It's as big as me! I don't have a banana for scale, but I do have my German potato self to compare!!
item.dc:creator: Boppit92

item.title: Meme Dump part 6 out of 200
item.description:
Happy Sunday everyone ♡
If you're new here
I'm cleaning out my 11k+ meme Dump folder
On my phone
From 2017
And it recommends
That I add a description
To every image
Which
I suck at
So I just ramble
A lot
On one of my past posts
I mentioned
A great
Zombie movie
Called
Train to Busan
11/10 recommend
Someone in the comments
Brought up
A zombie
TV show
Which is also
Incredibly amazing
Called
All Of Us Are Dead
On Netflix
It's been a bit since I've seen it
And im happy that I still
Love it as much as the
First time watching it
If you haven't
Seen it
And love Zombies
Please please watch it
Yesterday was my friends
Birthday party
And we played a bunch
Of online group games
Like Lethal Company and
JackBox
Today I'm taking
The core group of us
Into VRChat
And we're going to
Explore this haunted house
Where a monster is hunting you the entire time
I'm scared but excited
Thanks for joining me on another 11k meme folder phone cleaning dump. Hope everyone had a good weekend and gets lots of rest tonight ♡
item.dc:creator: Orangefish

item.title: A 21st century solution to my own housing crisis.
item.description:
TL:DR Couldn't afford a mortgage on a property. Took out a personal loan instead and knocked down parents garage and built myself an annexe instead.
Bonus photos of walk in bathroom

item.title: “Because only a grand conspiracy would explain why she might prefer Joe Biden over a man who everyday behaves worse than any man in a Taylor Swift song, which is saying a lot,” Seth Meyers
item.description: https://news.yahoo.com/nope-not-again-manipulated-images-220318164.htm https://factcheck.afp.com/doc.afp.com.34FR8UJ https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/factcheck/2024/01/22/altered-image-shows-taylor-swift-in-anti-trump-t-shirt-fact-check/72311842007/ Of course the photo has been doctored I posted links verifying that fact just thought it was funny and not as bad as lying about a border crisis that doesn't exist.

item.title: Memes vol 249 D&D
item.description:
Featuring a whole lotta tax
I still haven’t played yet
My next character will be a Tiefling. The current one is a Tabaxi bard
I built 9/11 out of the trains when I played ticket to ride
My friends just come over to hang if we don’t play but like minus one
Oh I have a thing for wings
Oops I didn’t crop
THAWTHOME GORREM
My tiefling horns (I’m so ready for the horny jokes)
I TOLD YOU THERES A LOTTA FRICKIN DOGS
Cha Cha
Oh here’s Coricopat
Sophie
Scruffy tax
Froggy tax
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Eilev Bråtene
item.description: A Norwegian storyteller born in 1828, Bø in Telemark. Described as a very short hunched man with round glasses in front of intelligent eyes. He used an axe as a walking stick, a rucksack that always had stuff hanging out of it and held a . He hardly ever bathed, but he was welcomed by everyone as they knew him as a captivating storyteller. According to himself he had met both Jutul (a type of giant) and the hulder who tried to seduce him. He married a widow 24 years older than him, who was known for her physical strength. On the day of their wedding, she that carried him over a river they had to cross to get to the church, to the amusement of the locals. Some of his stories was documented by Ingebret Moltke Moe, son of Jørgen Moe who gathered stories that you might know like "Three Billy Goats Gruff" and "Chicken Little". Eilev Bråtene died in 1899 when the 70 year old lost his footing and fell into a river. The newspaper obituary described him as an (roughly translated) "old weirdo".
item.dc:creator: TheAnswerWasAlwaysMoreLube

item.title: Tis my cake day! So I suggest we need more Jewel Staite on Imgur!
item.dc:creator: lifepassesmeby

item.title: At least I can file for unemployment...
item.description: Tomorrow is my official last day on payroll after being surplused. I started when I just turned 21 and I'll be 44 this summer. Survived countless amounts of corporate bullshit but the bell tolls for us all, I suppose. The genuine freaking out hasn't started yet, but I'm sure it's on the way.
item.dc:creator: pacmanownsyou

item.title: DNA Sweater!!! For one is crafty AND a nerd
item.description:
A couple oopsies, but overall not heckin' bad
Messy curly hair- can't do anything about it
Got cables on one side....
...and cables on the other side Pattern: https://www.ravelry.com/patterns/library/dna-pullover It's from a magazine, so before paying for it I really suggest checking you local libray catalog. I ordered the exact issue through inter-library loan, photo copied the pattern in the libray and BOOM! Free pattern ;-)
item.dc:creator: LittleChickadee
